structured.title: Charity Auction Challenge Begins
structured.overview: The conversation shifts from a casual reunion to a competitive charity challenge. The participants joke about clothing, money, and recent arrivals, then are given a task: they have 60 minutes and £100 each to buy items that they will later auction for charity, including one item to be professionally upcycled to increase its value. The setup introduces the teams and signals the start of the timed shopping challenge.
